be selected by default) 2026-04-16T23:03:58.043+01:00 INFO 25780 --- [progress-service] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists student_progress cascade Hibernate: create table student_progress ( completed boolean not null, progress_percent numeric(5,2), completed_at timestamp(6), course_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, enrollment_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, last_accessed_at timestamp(6), lesson_id bigint not null, student_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, primary key (id), constraint uq_enrollment_lesson unique (enrollment_id, lesson_id) ) Hibernate: create index idx_progress_enrollment_id on student_progress (enrollment_id) Hibernate: create index idx_progress_student_id on student_progress (student_id) Hibernate: create index idx_progress_course_id on student_progress (course_id) Hibernate: create index idx_progress_lesson_id on student_progress (lesson_id) 2026-04-16T23:03:58.096+01:00 INFO 25780 --- testcase.name: markLessonCompleted_alreadyCompleted_shouldReturnExisting

testcase.name: initializeProgress_shouldBeIdempotent
